author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Battlefield 6 - Season 3: Blastpoint Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/battlefield-6/

Blastpoint, the second Season 3 update for Battlefield 6 and REDSEC, arrives June 9 with the reimagined Cairo Bazaar, the return of Obliteration, and the Explosive Charge Bonus Path.

Fight through Cairo’s dense streets in close-quarters combat as PAX and NATO forces battle for control. Secure neutral bombs, escort carriers, and destroy enemy M-COMs in the return of Battlefield 4’s iconic Obliteration mode.

Unlock free rewards, including the PP-19 SMG and Handheld Jammer Recon Gadget, through the Explosive Charge Bonus Path.

All it takes is one spark to redefine your legacy.

#ps5 #ps5games #Battlefield6

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
27" Gaming Monitor with DualSense Charging Hook - Design Story | PlayStation
https://www.playstation.com/accessories/27-inch-gaming-monitor/

Play-Ready Desktop Gaming™ 

Always be ready to play on a 27" Gaming Monitor with DualSense® Charging Hook from PlayStation®. 

Featuring a QHD screen with HDR visuals*, refresh rates up to 240 Hz* with VRR support* for smooth gameplay, and a convenient DualSense® wireless controller charging hook to keep you ready for action anytime. Further customize your setup by connecting a PlayStation Link™ adapter and other accessories via multiple USB connections** to ensure your gaming space is always ready for play. 

Available from August 27, 2026, while supplies last from direct.playstation.com (U.S. only) and select retailers in the U.S. and Japan. 

*Features available with compatible devices and supported games, sold separately. Supports a refresh rate of up to 120 Hz when connected to a PS5 console. 

**The USB port functions as a hub and does not provide standalone functionality. A compatible device must be connected via the USB Type-B port for proper operation. 

#ps5 #playstation

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Ghostless - Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
Wishlist GHOSTLESS on PS5. 

Lead an uprising against AI in GHOSTLESS. Scavenge for resources, find survivors to grow your base, investigate android infiltrators and lead the resistance in a unique hybrid of 2.5D action-adventure and colony building.
